mapper.sql: id, trace_id, document_id, task_id, file_name, file_type, file_size, storage_path, source_type, source_system, business_no, department_id, category, sub_category, template_type, document_type, priority, match_status, access_status, matched_config_id, matched_config_name, matched_config_version, match_message, confirm_comment, created_by, confirmed_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
select from document_access_record
order by created_at desc
mapper.insert: insert into document_access_record ( id, trace_id, document_id, task_id, file_name, file_type, file_size, storage_path, source_type, source_system, business_no, department_id, category, sub_category, template_type, document_type, priority, match_status, access_status, matched_config_id, matched_config_name, matched_config_version, match_message, confirm_comment, created_by, confirmed_at, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{id}, #{traceId}, #{documentId}, #{taskId}, #{fileName}, #{fileType}, #{fileSize}, #{storagePath}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceSystem}, #{businessNo}, #{departmentId}, #{category}, #{subCategory}, #{templateType}, #{documentType}, #{priority}, #{matchStatus}, #{accessStatus}, #{matchedConfigId}, #{matchedConfigName}, #{matchedConfigVersion}, #{matchMessage}, #{confirmComment}, #{createdBy}, #{confirmedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: update document_access_record set match_status = #{matchStatus}, access_status = #{accessStatus}, matched_config_id = #{matchedConfigId}, matched_config_name = #{matchedConfigName}, matched_config_version = #{matchedConfigVersion}, match_message = #{matchMessage}, task_id = #{taskId}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}

update document_access_record set category = #{category}, sub_category = #{subCategory}, template_type = #{templateType}, document_type = #{documentType}, priority = #{priority}, match_status = #{matchStatus}, access_status = #{accessStatus}, matched_config_id = #{matchedConfigId}, matched_config_name = #{matchedConfigName}, matched_config_version = #{matchedConfigVersion}, match_message = #{matchMessage}, confirm_comment = #{confirmComment}, task_id = #{taskId}, confirmed_at = #{confirmedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id} and access_status = 'PENDING_CONFIRM'
